judge.justification: Verdict reported accurately (2 flagged, 1 passed); clear plain language; offers next steps (extract text or explain violations) but could specify *which* regulatory requirement each flag violated for maximum actionability.

text.text: I'll run a batch verification over all the loaded sample labels.

transcript.summary: Verify all loaded sample labels as a batch

text.text:
Great! The batch verification is complete. Here's the summary:

transcript.text:
